MINI MINUTES: Tracy Gang, Esq. appearing Plaintiff Pro Per. The May-22-2014 sanction against plaintiff is vacated. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jan-06-2015 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion To Change Venue From San Francisco Superior Court To Sonoma County Superior Court
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SABRINA M. BERDUX OF STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROGER BURBACH'S Motion To Change Venue From San Francisco Superior Court To Sonoma County Superior Court is Grant. No opposition filed. The matter will be transferred to Sonoma County Superior Court. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047
